---
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureFileRegexMatches:
        - ["<nav[^>]*id=\"TOC\"", "toc-title", "First Section", "Second Section"]
        - ["documentclass"]
---

This document tests that format.html.toc: true from `_quarto.yml`
is inherited correctly, even though the top-level toc: false exists.

## First Section

Some content in the first section.

## Second Section

Some content in the second section.

### Subsection

This should NOT appear in TOC since toc-depth is 2.
